Hi,

This is Leasing Desk from Northline. I have 238 Adelphi Street, Apt 2R in Fort Greene available June 20.

It is a real 1BR / 1 bath, $3,650 monthly, around 690 sq ft. Garden-facing, dishwasher, laundry in building, bike storage.

Owner may cover the broker fee, but I want to confirm in writing. I can show it today after 4 PM.
